Title: Blue Moon
Writer: Robert Kaplow, Lorenz Hart, Elizabeth Weiland
Actors: Ethan Hawke, Bobby Cannavale, Andrew Scott
Plot: Tells the story of Lorenz Hart's struggles with alcoholism and mental health as he tries to save face during the opening of "Oklahoma!".
Awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 15 wins & 73 nominations total
